new_value: {"description":"Research KISS framing adaptations for carrying IPv6 packets, CoAP messages, and LICHEN control commands over BLE UART/serial. Study spec/kiss-framing.md, standards/ham-radio.md, docs/kiss-aprs-bridge.md, spec/11-lci.md (SLIP vs KISS), existing lichen/lib/native/native.c framing, Python KISS in python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/.
